stages.concept:
# Unit 109: as + 원급 + as / as + 원급 + as possible - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **원급 비교** 표현에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **as + 형용사/부사(원급) + as** — ~만큼 …한/하게

> She is **as tall as** her mother.
> 그녀는 엄마만큼 키가 크다.

> He runs **as fast as** I do.
> 그는 나만큼 빠르게 달린다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정**: **not as(so) + 원급 + as** — ~만큼 …하지 않은

> He is **not as tall as** his brother.
> 그는 형만큼 키가 크지 않다.

> This book is **not so expensive as** that one.
> 이 책은 저 책만큼 비싸지 않다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **as + 원급 + as possible** — 가능한 한 ~하게 (= as ~ as one can)

> Please come **as soon as possible**.
> 가능한 한 빨리 와 주세요.

> Run **as fast as possible**.
> 가능한 한 빨리 뛰어라.
> = Run **as fast as you can**.

**Q. 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸을 채우세요.**
"Please answer as quickly as possible."
= "Please answer as quickly as (       ) can."
1. I
2. you ✅
3. we

👩‍🏫 선생님: 명령문 앞에는 주어 You가 생략되어 있으므로, as ~ as possible을 as ~ as 주어 can으로 바꿀 때 빈칸에는 you가 들어간답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: as ~ as(~만큼), not as ~ as(~만큼 않은), as ~ as possible(가능한 한)! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 109: as + 원급 + as, as + 원급 + as possible - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
This desk is as (     ) as mine.
> **정답** big

---

**02.** She runs as ? as he does.
> **정답** fast

---

**03.** Please come as ? as possible.
> **정답** soon

---

**04.** He is as ? as his brother.
> **정답** tall

---

**05.** Read as ? books as possible.
> **정답** many

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is as taller as her sister.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** taller → tall

---

**07.** He runs as faster as me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** faster → fast

---

**08.** Come as sooner as possible.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** sooner → soon

---

**09.** This bag is as cheaper as that one.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cheaper → cheap

---

**10.** She is as more beautiful as her mom.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more beautiful → beautiful

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 나만큼 키가 크다.
She is I am.
> **정답** as tall as

---

**12.** 가능한 한 빨리 와라.
Come possible.
> **정답** as soon as

---

**13.** 이 가방은 저것만큼 싸다.
This bag is that one.
> **정답** as cheap as

---

**14.** 가능한 한 많이 읽어라.
Read books possible.
> **정답** as many, as

---

**15.** 그는 그의 형만큼 똑똑하다.
He is his brother.
> **정답** as smart as

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 나만큼 빨리 달린다.
She as runs fast as me
> **정답** She / runs / as / fast / as / me

---

**17.** 가능한 한 조용히 해라.
Be as quiet as possible
> **정답** Be / as / quiet / as / possible

---

**18.** 이 책은 저것만큼 재미있다.
This book as is interesting as that one
> **정답** This / book / is / as / interesting / as / that / one

---

**19.** 가능한 한 열심히 공부해라.
Study hard as as possible
> **정답** Study / as / hard / as / possible

---

**20.** 그는 그의 아버지만큼 키가 크다.
is He as tall as his father
> **정답** He / is / as / tall / as / his / father
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 109: as + 원급 + as  as + 원급 + as possible - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom is as ________________ as Amy.
And Amy is as ___________________ as Tom.
kindly - smartly
kinder - smarter
kind - smart
more kind - more smart
> **정답** kind - smart

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy's spoken English is as ________________ as
Tom's.
And Tom's written English is as __________________
as Amy's.
well - perfectly
good - perfect
good - more perfect
well - perfecter
> **정답** good - perfect

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Complete your homework as _________ as _______.
Then I will take you to some places as _________ as
heaven.
fast - possible - nice
faster - possibly - nicer
fast - possible - nicer
fast - possibly - nice
> **정답** fast - possible - nice

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Tom is as kindly as Amy is.
Please stay as quietly as possible.
Health is as important as money.
This desk is as heavier as that closet.
• talkative 수다스러운
> **정답** Tom is as kindly as Amy is., This desk is as heavier as
that closet.

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
It is as windy as yesterday.
You should read this book as soon as possible.
Can you make my coffee as sweetly as sugar.
I will get there as faster as possible.
> **정답** Can you make my coffee as sweetly as sugar., I will
get there as faster as possible.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀의 두 번째 소설은 그녀의 첫 번째 소설만큼이나 두껍다.
Her second novel is as thick than her first
novel.
Her second novel is not as thicker as her first
novel.
Her second novel is as thick as her first novel.
Her second novel is as thickly as her first
novel.
> **정답** Her second novel is as thick as her first novel.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
가능한 한 분명하게 그것을 설명해 주실래요?
Will you explain it as clearly as you can?
Will you explain it as more clearly as possible?
Will you explain it as clear as possible?
Will you explain it as clearly as possible?
> **정답** Will you explain it as clearly as you can?, Will you
explain it as clearly as possible?

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
벌은 뱀 만큼이나 위험하다.
Bees are as dangerous as snakes.
Bees are as dangerously as snakes.
Bees are as dangerous than snakes.
Bees are more dangerous as snakes.
> **정답** Bees are as dangerous as snakes.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The lake is as deep as the river.
Her teeth are as white as snow.
Your photo is as clear as mine.
He can swim as faster as Amy can.
> **정답** He can swim as faster as Amy can.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
In the past, sugar was as rare as honey.
We should practice English as much as
possible.
Lemons are not as sweet as oranges.
Pizza is as taste as hamburger.
> **정답** Pizza is as taste as hamburger.

---

**11.** 빈 칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 것은?
This is cheaper ________ that.
She runs as fast _______ Tom.
This house is not as big ______ that house.
I am as strong ______ my dad.
> **정답** This is cheaper ________ that.

---

**12.** 다음 주어진 내용과 일치하는 것을 고르시오.
Tom: 53kg
Amy: 53kg
Sally: 45kg
Sally is as heavy as Tom.
Amy is as heavy as Tom.
Amy is not as heavy as Tom.
Sally is as heavy as Amy.
> **정답** Amy is as heavy as Tom.

---

**13.** 빈 칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
He drove as slowly as _____________.
he could
possible
possibly
he can
> **정답** he could, possible

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I will study English as hardly as math.
Amy is as nicely as Tom to almost all
people.
A waiter at the cafe spoke as slowly as he
could.
Tom can swim as fastly as Amy.
> **정답** A waiter at the cafe spoke as slowly as he could.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Let's finish our homework as quickly as we
can possible.
My apartment is as big as his apartment.
Can I stay here as long as possible?
Tom is singing as louder as he can.
> **정답** My apartment is as big as his apartment., Can I stay
here as long as possible?

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He walked as slow as he
could.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** slow → slowly

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom can speak English as
good as Amy.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** good → well

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
For students, playing is as
important than studying.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** than → as

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
From my house, Amy's house is as nearly as
my school. I often visit Amy. Her house is as
comfortable as mine. I like to stay at her
house because her mother cooks very well. Her
mother always says, "You can stay here as
longer as you want."
> **정답** near, comfortable, long

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Tom and Amy are very similar to each other. Tom is
as tall as Amy and she is as cleverly as Amy
too. Tom is poor at English. Tom's English is not as
good as Amy's. Tom decides to practice
English as hardly as she can. Maybe Tom's
English will be as perfect as Amy's someday.
> **정답** clever, good, hard, perfect
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 109 as + 원급 + as  as + 원급 + as possible (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 그녀만큼 빨리 헤엄칠 수 있다.
힌트 (     ) swim, fast
He can  (     )   (     )  she can.
정답 swim, as fast as

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Mavis는 가능한 한 조용히 말했다.
힌트 (     ) talk, quietly
Mavis  (     )   (     )  possible.
정답 talked, as quietly as

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
서울은 뉴욕만큼 혼잡하다.
힌트 (     ) be, crowded
Seoul  (     )   (     )  New
York.
정답 is, as crowded as

---

**04.** 주어진 문장을 같은 의미의 다른 문장으로 나타내시오.
I tried to speak as clearly as possible.
I tried to speak as clearly as  (     ) .
정답 I could

---

**05.** 주어진 문장을 같은 의미의 다른 문장으로 나타내시오.
My father drives as slowly as he can.
My father drives as slowly as  (     ) .
정답 possible

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐쓰시오. (원급 표현)
Today is as wind as yesterday.
→ Today is  (     )  yesterday.
정답 as windy as

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐쓰시오. (원급 표현)
You can run as fast than they can.
→ You can run  (     ) .
정답 as fast as they can (as fast as possible)

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오. (as ~ as
구문을 사용할 것)
It's important to use your English everyday. You
should practice speaking English
[often] (     )  you can.
정답 as often as

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오. (as ~ as
구문을 사용할 것)
Thanks for offering the help, but I can carry the
box alone. It's [light] (     )  a feather.
정답 as light as

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 다음 대화를 완성하시오. (as ~ as
구문을 사용할 것)
A: How old are you?
B: I am 15 years old. How about you?
A: I am 12 years old.
B: You are  (     ) old (     )  I am.
정답 not as old as

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 109: as + 원급 + as / as + 원급 + as possible - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom is as ________________ as Amy.
And Amy is as ___________________ as Tom.
kindly - smartly kinder - smarter kind - smart more kind - more smart
> 정답: kind - smart

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom's spoken Korean is as ________________ as Amy's.
And Amy's written Korean is as __________________ as Tom's.
well - perfectly good - perfect good - more perfect well - perfecter
> 정답: good - perfect

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Complete your project as _________ as _______.
Then I will take you to some places as _________ as paradise.
fast - possible - nice faster - possibly - nicer fast - possible - nicer fast - possibly - nice
> 정답: fast - possible - nice

---

**04.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom is as kindly as Amy is.
Please stay as quietly as possible.
Health is as important as wealth.
This box is as heavier as that cabinet.
> 정답: Tom is as kindly as Amy is., This box is as heavier as

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It is as rainy as yesterday.
You should read this article as soon as possible.
Can you make my tea as sweetly as honey.
I will get there as faster as possible.
> 정답: Can you make my tea as sweetly as honey., I will

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그의 두 번째 영화는 그의 첫 번째 영화만큼이나 길다.
His second movie is as long than his first movie.
His second movie is not as longer as his first movie.
His second movie is as long as his first movie.
His second movie is as longly as his first movie.
> 정답: His second movie is as long as his first movie.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 가능한 한 정확하게 그것을 설명해 주실래요?
Will you explain it as accurately as you can?
Will you explain it as more accurately as possible?
Will you explain it as accurate as possible?
Will you explain it as accurately as possible?
> 정답: Will you explain it as accurately as you can?, Will you

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
상어는 독수리만큼이나 위험하다.
Sharks are as dangerous as eagles.
Sharks are as dangerously as eagles.
Sharks are as dangerous than eagles.
Sharks are more dangerous as eagles.
> 정답: Sharks are as dangerous as eagles.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The lake is as wide as the river.
Her hair is as dark as night.
Your drawing is as detailed as mine.
He can run as faster as Amy can.
> 정답: He can run as faster as Amy can.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
In the past, gold was as rare as diamonds.
We should exercise as much as possible.
Limes are not as sweet as peaches.
Sushi is as taste as steak.
> 정답: Sushi is as taste as steak.

---

**11.** 빈 칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 것은? This is taller ________ that. She sings as well _______  Amy. This room is not as bright ______ that room. I am as tough ______ my dad.
> 정답: This is taller ________ that.

---

**12.** 다음 주어진 내용과 일치하는 것을 고르시오.
Tom: 165cm Amy: 165cm Sam: 155cm Sam is as tall as Tom.
Amy is as tall as Tom.
Amy is not as tall as Tom.
Sam is as tall as Amy.
> 정답: Amy is as tall as Tom.

---

**13.** 빈 칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) He drove as carefully as _____________. he could possible possibly he can
> 정답: he could, possible

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I will study math as hardly as science.
Tom is as nicely as Amy to almost everyone.
A clerk at the shop spoke as slowly as he could.
Amy can swim as fastly as Tom.
> 정답: A clerk at the shop spoke as slowly as he could.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Let's finish our project as quickly as we can possible.
My room is as big as his room.
Can I stay here as long as possible?
Tom is singing as louder as he can.
> 정답: My room is as big as his room., Can I stay

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  walked  as  slow  as  she could. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: slow → slowly

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Amy  can  speak  Korean  as good  as  Tom. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: good → well

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. For  children,  playing  is  as important  than  learning. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: than → as

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
From my house, Tom's house is as nearly as my school.
I often visit Tom.
His house is as comfortable as mine.
I like to stay at his house because his mother cooks very well.
His mother always says, "You can stay here as longer as you want."
> 정답: near, comfortable, long

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
